first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as a senior-level builder who, despite extensive experience, lacks the specific director-level AI strategy, leadership, and scaled AI product experience required for the target role. The minor differences in wording and the slight discrepancy in counting years of experience (19 vs. 18) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate any reliance on the redacted name or contact information.
